title: GIS Explorer
description: The GIS Explorer enables geographic analysis of patient populations and clinical data by visualizing OMOP data on spatial maps. Researchers can identify geographic patterns in disease burden, healthcare utilization, and population characteristics to support public health and epidemiological investigations.
tips: Use geographic filters in combination with cohort definitions to analyze regional variation in disease prevalence or treatment patterns.
Aggregate patient data to appropriate geographic units (e.g., postal code, region) to protect patient privacy while enabling spatial analysis.
Overlay external geographic datasets, such as social determinants of health indicators, to enrich spatial analyses.
Export GIS visualizations for inclusion in study reports or presentations to communicate geographic findings clearly.
